steps.title: Identify the specific goal
steps.content: The student wants to specify Tristan Otto's location. The notes tell us Tristan Otto is on display at the Natural History Museum, and that museum is in Berlin, Germany. A correct answer must state where Tristan Otto is physically located.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Tristan Otto is the nickname of a dinosaur fossil specimen belonging to the genus Tyrannosaurus.': Gives taxonomy, not location. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Tristan Otto is on display at the Natural History Museum in Berlin, Germany.': Directly states where Tristan Otto is displayed and where that museum is located — exactly what the goal requires. ✓
  • Choice C — 'Berlin, Germany, is home to the Natural History Museum, which displays a dinosaur fossil specimen from the Late Cretaceous period.': Mentions the museum's location but refers to "a dinosaur fossil specimen" without naming Tristan Otto, so it does not specify Tristan Otto's location. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Tristan Otto lived in the Late Cretaceous period, which ended more than 65 million years ago.': Gives a time period, not a physical location. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
